ops.title: plugin/hooks refactor: DRY conftest, public-surface tests, de-underscore, module splits

ops.text: conftest.py hoists duplicated fixtures; whitebox tests normalized to public surface; zero single-underscore module-level defs (ccx code grep --regex 'def _[a-z]' plugin/hooks → 0); search_guards.py + command_rewrites.py split by family; pytest + capt-hook inline tests green; identical hook count pre/post split
